---
title: "Econometrics Tutorials"
subtitle: "Economics and Finance · Sapienza University of Rome · Faculty of Economics"
lang: en

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    fontsize: 1.25em
    linestretch: 1.7

listing:
  - id: intro
    template: editorial.ejs.md
    sort: false
    contents:
      - path: introduction/introduction.qmd
        title: "Introduction to R"
        description: "First steps in R: objects, vectors, data frames, and basic plotting."
        script: introduction/introduction.R
      - path: introduction/regression_with_fixest.qmd
        title: "Regression with fixest"
        description: "Running and reading regressions in R with the fixest package."
        script: introduction/regression_with_fixest.R
  - id: tutorials
    template: editorial.ejs.md
    sort: false
    contents:
      - path: tutorial1/tutorial1.qmd
        script: tutorial1/tutorial1_script.R
      - path: tutorial2/tutorial2.qmd
        script: tutorial2/tutorial2_script.R
      - path: tutorial3/tutorial3.qmd
        script: tutorial3/tutorial3_script.R
      - path: tutorial4/tutorial4.qmd
        script: tutorial4/tutorial4_script.R
      - path: tutorial5/tutorial5.qmd
        script: tutorial5/tutorial5_script.R
      - path: tutorial6/tutorial6.qmd
        script: tutorial6/tutorial6_script.R
      - path: tutorial7/tutorial7.qmd
        script: tutorial7/tutorial7_script.R
      - path: tutorial8/tutorial8.qmd
        script: tutorial8/tutorial8_script.R
      - path: tutorial9/tutorial9.qmd
        script: tutorial9/tutorial9_script.R
      - path: tutorial10/tutorial10.qmd
        script: tutorial10/tutorial10_script.R
  - id: problem-sets
    template: editorial.ejs.md
    sort: false
    contents:
      - path: problem-sets/problem_set_01.qmd
        title: "Problem Set 1 — Questions"
      - path: problem-sets/problem_set_01_solutions.qmd
        title: "Problem Set 1 — Solutions"
      - path: problem-sets/log_models_review.qmd
        title: "Review of Log Models"
---

Materials for the tutorials of the undergraduate **Econometrics** course.

## Installing R and RStudio

1. Download and install **R** from [cran.r-project.org](https://cran.r-project.org).
2. Download and install **RStudio** from [posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop).

## Introduction to R

::: {#intro}
:::

## Tutorials

::: {#tutorials}
:::

## Problem Sets & Reviews

::: {#problem-sets}
:::

Report typos or errors by opening an [issue](https://github.com/andrerecio/econometrics-undergraduate/issues).
